title: Backend Developer Vacancy at 1mg Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at 1mg Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the 1mg Capital India family as a Backend Developer in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About 1mg Capital India:
1mg Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg Capital India!
